specific_question: How many virtual care team members at MediConn accessed the internal knowledge management platform at least weekly in Q1 2025?
answer: According to data from MediConn's Telehealth Department, between January 1 and March 31, 2025, out of 120 virtual care professionals, 95 (79%) accessed the platform at least weekly, showing strong engagement with critical medical information.
dr_question: How can MediConn Solutions strengthen its knowledge management system by Q3 2026 to help virtual care teams prevent knowledge-related errors that are shown to be a leading cause of medical errors.
